    1. build()

Interface Builder<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the Java type of values produced by the built generator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractBuilder, BigDecimalGenerator.Builder, BitGenerator.Builder, BitStringGenerator.Builder, BooleanGenerator.Builder, ByteGenerator.Builder, CharacterGenerator.Builder, ChildCountGenerator.Builder, ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder, CidrGenerator.Builder, CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.Builder, CreditGenerator.Builder, CurrentSqlTimestampGenerator.Builder, CustomerLastNameGenerator.Builder, DataColumnGenerator.Builder, DateGenerator.Builder, DoubleGenerator.Builder, FloatGenerator.Builder, GroupedPermutationGenerator.Builder, GroupedPrefixGenerator.Builder, InetGenerator.Builder, InstantGenerator.Builder, IntegerArrayGenerator.Builder, IntegerGenerator.Builder, IntervalGenerator.Builder, JsonbGenerator.Builder, LongGenerator.Builder, MacAddressGenerator.Builder, NormalDoubleGenerator.Builder, NormalIntegerGenerator.Builder, OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder, ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder, SequentialIntegerGenerator.Builder, ShortGenerator.Builder, SimpleStringGenerator.Builder, SkewedTimestampGenerator.Builder, SqlBlobGenerator.Builder, SqlClobGenerator.Builder, SqlDateGenerator.Builder, SqlStructGenerator.Builder, SqlTimeGenerator.Builder, SqlTimestampGenerator.Builder, StaticBigDecimalGenerator.Builder, StaticDoubleGenerator.Builder, StaticFloatGenerator.Builder, StaticIntegerGenerator.Builder, StaticStringGenerator.Builder, StringArrayGenerator.Builder, UUIDGenerator.Builder, VariableStringGenerator.Builder, WeightedCategoricalGenerator.Builder, XmlGenerator.Builder, ZipCodeGenerator.Builder, ZipfianIntegerGenerator.Builder
public interface Builder<T>
Builder interface for creating data generator instances. Implementations of this interface follow the Builder pattern to construct configured data generators.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DataGenerator<T>
    build()
    Builds and returns a configured data generator.

  • Method Details

    • build

      DataGenerator<T> build()
      Builds and returns a configured data generator.
      Returns:
      a new DataGenerator configured with the builder's settings
